query:
INSERT INTO state_building_codes (state, code_name, code_version, effective_date, description, requirements, source_url) VALUES
('NSW', 'Environmental Planning and Assessment Act 1979', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary planning legislation for NSW', 'Development consent requirements, building certification', 'https://legislation.nsw.gov.au'),
('VIC', 'Building Act 1993', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for Victoria', 'Building permits, occupancy permits, building practitioners', 'https://www.legislation.vic.gov.au'),
('QLD', 'Building Act 1975', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for Queensland', 'Building development approvals, building certifiers', 'https://www.legislation.qld.gov.au'),
('SA', 'Planning Development and Infrastructure Act 2016', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary planning legislation for South Australia', 'Development approval, building rules consent', 'https://www.legislation.sa.gov.au'),
('WA', 'Building Act 2011', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for Western Australia', 'Building permits, occupancy permits', 'https://www.legislation.wa.gov.au'),
('TAS', 'Building Act 2016', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for Tasmania', 'Building permits, plumbing permits', 'https://www.legislation.tas.gov.au'),
('NT', 'Building Act 1993', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for Northern Territory', 'Building permits, building certifiers', 'https://legislation.nt.gov.au'),
('ACT', 'Building Act 2004', '2024', '2024-01-01', 'Primary building legislation for ACT', 'Building approvals, building certifiers', 'https://www.legislation.act.gov.au')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code_version = VALUES(code_version)
